ddls:
CREATE TABLE "parent_packages" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parent package */,
  "package_name" TEXT /* Name of the parent package */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the parent package */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parent package */,
  "maintainer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the maintainer of the package */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "imported_packages" (
  "imported_package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each imported package */,
  "imported_package_name" TEXT /* Name of the imported package */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the imported package */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the imported package */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("imported_package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "imported_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each imported method */,
  "imported_package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the imported package */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the imported method */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the imported method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_imported_methods_imported_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("imported_package_id") REFERENCES imported_packages ("imported_package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "imported_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each imported class */,
  "imported_package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the imported package */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the imported class */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the imported class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_imported_classes_imported_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("imported_package_id") REFERENCES imported_packages ("imported_package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "required_packages" (
  "required_package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each required package */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent package */,
  "required_package_name" TEXT /* Name of the required package */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the required package */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the required package */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("required_package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_required_packages_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES parent_packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "package_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each package interaction */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent package */,
  "imported_package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the imported package */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., import, no import) */,
  "interaction_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the interaction */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_interactions_imported_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("imported_package_id") REFERENCES imported_packages ("imported_package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_interactions_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES parent_packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dependency_graph" (
  "graph_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each graph node */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent package */,
  "imported_package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the imported package */,
  "graph_data" TEXT /* Data for the dependency graph node */,
  "graph_type" TEXT /* Type of graph (e.g., directed, undirected) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("graph_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependency_graph_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES parent_packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependency_graph_imported_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("imported_package_id") REFERENCES imported_packages ("imported_package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "usage_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., imports, methods, classes) */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data for the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_reports_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES parent_packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conflict_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conflict log */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent package */,
  "imported_package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the imported package */,
  "conflict_type" TEXT /* Type of conflict (e.g., overlapping imports, conflicting methods) */,
  "conflict_details" TEXT /* Details of the conflict */,
  "resolution_status" TEXT /* Status of conflict resolution (e.g., unresolved, resolved) */,
  "resolution_details" TEXT /* Details of the resolution */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conflict_logs_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES parent_packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conflict_logs_imported_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("imported_package_id") REFERENCES imported_packages ("imported_package_id")
)
